name: Bowl of Berries
recipeInstructions:
1. To make stems, mix water and green food coloring in a shallow bowl. Add almonds. Allow to soak and absorb color, stirring several times.
2. In a large bowl, beat softened margarine with powdered sugar until fluffy. Gradually add gelatin powder, vanilla, salt, flour, red-colored sugar, and green-colored sugar. Chill for 30 minutes.
3. Form the dough into 48 balls, about 1 inch in diameter. Taper one end of each to make a strawberry shape. Roll in red sugar. Dip the wider end in green sugar. Insert an almond stem into the wide end of each berry.
4. Place the berries 1 inch apart on baking sheets. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 11-12 minutes, or until set but not browned.
5. Makes 48 servings.
